# zabbix Provider

The Zabbix provider manages Zabbix resources via the JSON-RPC API. Credentials can be supplied via provider attributes or environment variables.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Credentials can be supplied via provider attributes or environment variables:
#   ZABBIX_URL   — base URL of the Zabbix frontend
#   ZABBIX_TOKEN — Zabbix API token
#
# When both are set in the environment the provider block can be empty.
provider "zabbix" {
  zabbix_url = "https://zabbix.example.com"
  api_token  = "your-api-token"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) Zabbix API token for authentication. May also be set via the `ZABBIX_TOKEN` environment variable.
- `zabbix_url` (String) Base URL of the Zabbix frontend (e.g. `https://zabbix.example.com`). May also be set via the `ZABBIX_URL` environment variable.
